title: Disaster Plants - Cursed Fate Addon.
description: This mod adds Disaster Plants to the Cursed Fate Mod! It adds Roots, Wooden Ball, Cursed Buds, Maximum Output, Flower Field, and Shining Sea of Growing Branches.
body:
Hanami's Disaster Plants Technique


**Ability 1: Roots**
Shoot roots out from the ground under your target's feet which will deal damage in a radius around it.

_Flow:_ Increases Damage

_Chant:_ Makes this move an area move instead.

*If you have 3 Focus Points and your output is all the way up, you will get a bar on the side of your screen that will charge when you press this ability

_Max Output:_ When fully charged you will shoot out a ball of energy that you have collected.


**Ability 2: Wooden Ball**
Shoot out 3 wooden balls forward that will deal a high amount of damage when they hit.

_Flow:_ Increases Size and Damage

_Chant:_ Increases amount to 5


**Ability 3: Cursed Buds**
Shoot out a cursed bud forward that will latch onto your target, (if they have Flow, RCT, Veil, or anything like this activated the time will be doubled) this will drain CT overtime.

_Max Output:_ Place down larger cursed bud-like creatures (Called Cursed Chompers) that will begin to shoot splinters out forward.


**Ability 4: Maximum Output**
Turn on maximum output which will change up some of your moves.


**Ability 5: Flower Field**
Shoot out a line of flowers forward that will calm down your targets, slowing them down for a short period of time.


**Ability 6: Shining Sea of Growing Branches**
[Non Max Output Not Currently Implimented]

_Max Output:_ Jump up into the air and create a massive root under your feet that will deal a massive amount of damage to everyone around and will send them flying away from you!


Discord: https://discord.gg/rgyWc3ztvK

Tenseikwam's Anime/Comic Server (The funder of this mod): https://discord.gg/x9fp48U7eA

Ko-Fi https://ko-fi.com/marcelinesorigins (Allow you to support me/Suggest CT to be made!)
